narrative:
Precinct Adams (precinct in Muskingum County) has 238 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
